fields.title: Remove unused state parameter from initExa and initCommit
fields.description: initExa(pi, _state) and initCommit(pi, _state) in exa/index.ts and commit/index.ts accept a TauState parameter that is never read (prefixed with underscore). Their callers in services/exa.ts and services/commit.ts pass {} as unknown as TauState - a fake empty object that would crash if the legacy code ever tried to read state properties.
fields.design: Remove the _state parameter from both function signatures. Update the callers in services/exa.ts and services/commit.ts to stop passing the empty object. This also eliminates 2 of the 18 'as unknown as' casts.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Both initExa and initCommit accept only (pi: ExtensionAPI). No empty-object casts remain in services/exa.ts or services/commit.ts. npm run gate passes.
fields.notes: Removed unused TauState parameter from initExa/initCommit and updated services/exa.ts + services/commit.ts callers to pass only pi. Removed TauState imports in all four files. Ran 'cd extensions/tau && npm run gate' successfully (typecheck/lint/test pass; lint has pre-existing warnings only).
